symptom_vector: Pod crash, pod terminated unexpectedly, container exit, pod failure

expert_knowledge.root_cause_desc: Component [tidb-tidb-0, tidb-tidb] experienced [connection_count, uptime, qps, block_cache_size, tidb-tidb] fault.
reasoning_chain: Step 1: Check Metadata - Confirm faulty component is [tidb-tidb-0, tidb-tidb] (From Ground Truth instance field)
Step 2: Check Observation - Found keyword [productcatalogservice] in Trace data (From GT key_observations trace subtype)
Step 3: Check Observation - Found keyword [failure] in Log data (From GT key_observations log keyword)
Step 4: Check Observation - Found keywords [block_cache_size, connection_count, qps, slow_query, uptime, cpu_usage, memory_usage] in Metric data (From GT key_observations metric keywords)
Step 5: Derive Root Cause - Based on above features, determined cause is [connection_count, uptime, qps, block_cache_size, tidb-tidb] (From Ground Truth key_metrics)

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Trace data shows latency anomalies and request proportion anomalies involving productcatalogservice
critical_checks.instruction: Search for traces containing 'productcatalogservice' and check for latency spikes or abnormal request patterns

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Log entries containing 'failure' keyword related to pod/container termination
critical_checks.instruction: Search for keyword 'failure' in logs to identify pod crash or termination events

critical_checks.instruction: Check metric [block_cache_size] for tidb-tidb pods to identify anomalies
